title: geraniospermum ochroleucum
intro: Geraniospermum ochroleucum is a flowering plant, also known as white jasmine, which belongs to the family Menispermaceae. It has been traditionally used in various parts of the world for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Geraniospermum ochroleucum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for use in traditional medicine, although its uses and availability may vary depending on the region.
